{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321142444E249A491ACB3FAFCEB36\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503399715184280382","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书作者笔力遒劲，文思巧妙。虽然是穿越文，但一直在强调故事的真实性。不是，一开头，“我穿越了”也不是一开头“我重生了。”也不是一开始“我们相遇了”也不是一见面“我们相爱了。”讲究的是有理有据的穿越，和步步为营的喜欢。男主心意的更改是一步一步的，不是一下子的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747023135,"group_id":"7491910909581855768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6yKKrbVBpdcUa83yUzehaZotuEXDXhgTFIaZSSWvlfJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/469c5dbe9f864539abe3d302b0467811~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776621301\u0026x-signature=5gJ8BRY2QSJHI6Rw%2BPuCkedaF%2BI%3D","user_id":"3505705350871757","user_name":"十里桃花十里春风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3505705350871757","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7491910909581855768","book_info":{"abstract":"本书讲述了一个普通女大学生一个偶然的机会穿越到了一千多年前。出于尊重历史的考虑，不能随便改变历史，所以写了一个从来没有的朝代——萧国。萧国的太子妃因为性格嚣张跋扈不通文采而不被太子所喜，最终因为妒忌而“刺杀”太子侧妃李青青被太子所废。因为受不了这个打击，选择了上吊自杀。刚好上大学的楚悠然因为在学校的一处还没有推平的山上采摘草药，一不留神摔到了一处山洞——正是学校古代建筑的地下室。然后触摸到了穿越神器——铜虚镜。结果古代的太子妃死而复生，转了性子，然后获得太子宠爱的故事。\n太子是一个赏罚分明，有同情心，勤勉朝政的温柔男子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/90b5396068deb957d4a066a99db2cb16","author":"十里桃花十里春风","author_id":"","book_id":"7491910909581855768","book_name":"大学生穿越到古代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":749,\"name\":\"青春甜宠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749\u0026name=青春甜宠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":3,\"name\":\"现代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3\u0026name=现代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":4,\"name\":\"校园\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4\u0026name=校园\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":464,\"name\":\"异世穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464\u0026name=异世穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":463,\"name\":\"今穿古\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463\u0026name=今穿古\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7491920804813210137","read_count":"407","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"117729"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"97","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,异世穿越,今穿古","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofa938c1c14d243663dbdef25cdbfa72a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779258284\u0026x-signature=C33%2Fa0yWJQWQ9UsYfO%2BZTzkvhhA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3505705350871757","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"527"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321142444E249A491ACB3FAFCEB36\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":83409,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":490},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1747036742,"author_reply_time":1747222334,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503839612773139224","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，非常精彩的剧情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747125764,"group_id":"7491910909581855768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9wUVRa7VhIu/VRQ/w9eB1U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"111041047713","user_name":"瑞门口的辛岩柏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111041047713","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7491910909581855768","book_info":{"abstract":"本书讲述了一个普通女大学生一个偶然的机会穿越到了一千多年前。出于尊重历史的考虑，不能随便改变历史，所以写了一个从来没有的朝代——萧国。萧国的太子妃因为性格嚣张跋扈不通文采而不被太子所喜，最终因为妒忌而“刺杀”太子侧妃李青青被太子所废。因为受不了这个打击，选择了上吊自杀。刚好上大学的楚悠然因为在学校的一处还没有推平的山上采摘草药，一不留神摔到了一处山洞——正是学校古代建筑的地下室。然后触摸到了穿越神器——铜虚镜。结果古代的太子妃死而复生，转了性子，然后获得太子宠爱的故事。\n太子是一个赏罚分明，有同情心，勤勉朝政的温柔男子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/90b5396068deb957d4a066a99db2cb16","author":"十里桃花十里春风","author_id":"","book_id":"7491910909581855768","book_name":"大学生穿越到古代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schem
